prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 84.1 kg; Height 184.8 cm; BMI 24.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 6.9%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 205mg/dL; 9 months ago 198mg/dL; 6 months ago 161mg/dL; 3 months ago 180mg/dL; current 113mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 84.8kg; 9 months ago 81.2kg; 6 months ago 83.9kg; 3 months ago 81.3kg; current 84.1kg), Height (12 months ago 184.8cm; 9 months ago 184.8cm; 6 months ago 184.8cm; 3 months ago 184.8cm; current 184.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 61mmHg; 9 months ago 61mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 60mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 66U/L; 9 months ago 62U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 65U/L; current 66U/L), AST (12 months ago 89U/L; 9 months ago 93U/L; 6 months ago 85U/L; 3 months ago 86U/L; current 89U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; current 35mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 342mg/g; 9 months ago 318mg/g; 6 months ago 411mg/g; 3 months ago 293mg/g; current 284mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 101mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 33mg/dL; 6 months ago 34mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 35mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 164mg/dL; 9 months ago 163mg/dL; 6 months ago 183mg/dL; 3 months ago 162mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.9g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
